case_title: MC MISSION 5801, LLC VS. NENITA FIEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-07-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RUBEN FIEL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. DENNIS FERNANDEZ, NON-CERTIFIED TAGALOG INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, PRESENT AND ASSISTED DEFENDANT. COURT FINDS THAT A CERTIFIED INTERPRETER IS NOT AVAILABLE AND APPOINTS A QUALIFIED INTERPRETER, DENNIS FERNANDEZ, AND THAT QUALIFICATION REQUIREMENTS AND ALL REQUIRED PROCEDURES HAVE BEEN FOLLOWED. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-07-2016 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RUBEN FIEL'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. DENNIS FERNANDEZ, NON-CERTIFIED TAGALOG INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, PRESENT AND ASSISTED DEFENDANT. COURT FINDS THAT A CERTIFIED INTERPRETER IS NOT AVAILABLE AND APPOINTS A QUALIFIED INTERPRETER, DENNIS FERNANDEZ, AND THAT QUALIFICATION REQUIREMENTS AND ALL REQUIRED PROCEDURES HAVE BEEN FOLLOWED. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES & EXPENSES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
